## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets, real emails, or real tenant IDs in the diff
- [ ] Updated `docs/FEATURES.md` if a feature shipped, changed status, or was removed
- [ ] Updated `CLAUDE.md` if I introduced a new pattern or a new "don't reintroduce X" decision
- [ ] For UI changes: actually clicked through the affected screen in a real browser
